name: Arcane Sword
components: V, S, M (a miniature platinum sword with a grip and pommel of copper and zinc, worth 250 gp)
description: You create a sword-­‐‑shaped plane of force that hovers within range. It lasts for the duration. When the sword appears, you make a melee spell attack against a target of your choice within 5 feet of the sword. On a hit, the target takes 3d10 force damage. Until the spell ends, you can use a bonus action on each of your turns to move the sword up to 20 feet to a spot you can see and repeat this attack against the same target or a different one. Arcanist’s Magic Aura 2nd-­‐‑level illusion
